S.FORM: Donald Tusk I 1957 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci ( , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Poland anini i ci Donald Tusk, patirengan a romi'ad i 2023 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 6 a romi'ad. Kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô

S.FORM: Donald Tusk I 1957 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci ( , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Poland anini i ci Donald Tusk, patirengan a romi'ad i 2023 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 6 a romi'ad.
